title: Youtube poop: Robotnik Wants To F%&K The Queen
description:
another epic poop!
it's been a while since I did a Sonic Poop but here it is this one is much better than the Sonic vs Knuckles one (which I did not like) but with the magic of adobe premiere I can make a boring episode into the most epic episode ever! (credits coming soon)
